message:
fix: resolve all 98 ty type-check diagnostics for CI

- Fix SQLAlchemy column descriptor access (`.isnot()`, `.is_()`) by
  wrapping column references in `cast(Any, ...)` so ty sees the SA
  column API rather than the Python-typed field
- Fix `int | None` narrowing for SQLModel `.id` fields by adding
  `assert obj.id is not None` after `session.flush()`/`session.refresh()`
- Fix `dict.get()` overload mismatch by using `cast(dict[str, Any], ...)`
  for dynamically-obtained tool registries
- Fix `Pool` attribute access by casting to `Any` (runtime-only methods)
- Fix structlog processor list type to `list[Any]`
- Fix `rich_logger` recursive dict/list cast for nested tree building
- Fix `write_agent_profile` param type to `Mapping[str, object]` for
  covariant dict value types
- Fix `d.diff` access with isinstance guard for bytes vs str
- Fix `renderables` list type to accept both `Text` and `Syntax`
- Fix `manifest_data` type to `dict[str, str | bool]` for tamper test
- Fix deeply nested dict type annotation in security test
- Fix git commit message type with `str()` wrapper
- Fix FastMCP private method access via `cast(Any, ...)`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
